join_order.probe: num (filtered: uom='USD' AND ddate BETWEEN 20230101 AND 20231231)
join_order.notes: Use mmap'd pre_atv_hash (384MB, 2^25 slots, open-addressing). Zero build cost at query time (P11, P19). Probe with (num.adsh_code, num.tag_code, num.ver_code) using hash3 = (a*2654435761u)^(b*1234567891u)^(c*2246822519u) & mask. Bounded probe loop (C24). If adsh_code==INT32_MIN -> empty -> not found -> include row. Anti-join: include row only when NOT FOUND.

filters.notes: Load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime, find usd_code (C2). Compare int16_t uom[i] == usd_code.
Raw YYYYMMDD integer stored as int32_t. Compare: ddate[i] >= 20230101 && ddate[i] <= 20231231. NO epoch conversion (C1 not applicable — column is INTEGER not DATE type).
No nulls in dataset per Query Guide — skip check.

zone_map.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=602][{int32_t min_val, int32_t max_val, uint32_t block_size} x 602]
zone_map.notes: Apply block-level skip before row-level filter (C19). Only use zone map on ddate column which has the index — NOT on uom or other columns.

data_structures.anti_join_lookup: pre_built_index(pre_atv_hash, mmap, 384MB, 2^25 slots, AtvSlot{int32_t adsh,tag,ver}, sentinel=INT32_MIN via std::fill C20)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local_open_addressing_hash_map(key=uint64_t packed(tag_code<<32|ver_code), value={int64_t sum_cents, int64_t count}, cap=next_power_of_2(200000*2)=524288)
data_structures.aggregation_notes: Pack (tag_code, ver_code) into single uint64_t for O(1) key compare. Size cap to 524288 per thread (covers estimated distinct tag+ver combos in filtered data). All 64 thread-local maps merged after parallel barrier (P17, P20). Do NOT use shared aggregation map (P20 anti-pattern: catastrophic contention).
data_structures.output_buffer: flat_array(sorted by cnt DESC, max 100 entries after HAVING)

parallelism.granularity: block_level (65536 rows per morsel, aligned to zone-map blocks)
parallelism.thread_local: each thread maintains its own open-addressing hash map for (tag_code,ver_code)->{sum_cents,count}
parallelism.merge: sequential merge of 64 thread-local maps into single global map after #pragma omp barrier — fast because total distinct groups is small (P17)

indexes.probe_bound: bounded for-loop p in [0, cap) — break on sentinel (C24)

aggregates.notes: C29 MANDATORY: num.value has max ~1e16, double precision insufficient. Accumulate as int64_t cents. Output: sum_cents/100 . abs(sum_cents%100) with sign handling.

column_io.madvise: MADV_SEQUENTIAL on all num columns; MADV_RANDOM on pre_atv_hash (random probe access pattern)

decode.total: printf format: sum_cents/100 with 2 decimal places (C29 int64_t cents output)

critical_rules: C2: load uom_dict.txt at runtime to find usd_code — never hardcode
C18: decode tag and version codes to strings via dict[code].c_str() for output
C19: zone-map skip ONLY on num/ddate (has zone map index) — not on uom
C20: pre_atv_hash sentinel is INT32_MIN set via std::fill — never memset
C24: bounded probe loop in pre_atv_hash (for p=0; p<cap; p++) — break on sentinel
C29: SUM(value) MUST use int64_t cents accumulator: sum_cents += llround(value*100.0)
P11: use mmap'd pre_atv_hash — never build runtime hash table for pre (P19: 19-65s thrash)
P17/P20: thread-local aggregation maps per thread — merge after barrier — never shared map
